definition:
A man living at the time of Exile and Return, only mentioned at Ezr.10.18; 
 father of: Jeshua (H3442)
 § Jozadak = "Jehovah is righteous"
 grandson of the high priest Hilkiah; son of the high priest Seraiah; and father of the high priest Joshua; he never attained the office of high priest himself because he was carried captive to Babylon by Nebuchadnezzar (in Aramaic writings)
